🚀 Prototype Demo

AI Lead Scoring for Zement Stone

Automatically scans Colorado building permit databases, scores every project, and generates personalized outreach emails — in seconds.

📋 How it works

  1. Input: CSV export from any building permit database
  2. AI Scoring: Each permit gets a score 1–100 based on project type, budget, construction phase, and fit for stone veneer
  3. Output: Prioritized list + ready-to-send outreach email for every hot lead
📍 This demo combines 644 real Colorado permits: 500 from Denver Open Data (City & County of Denver) and 144 from Fort Collins Building Permits. Use the tabs below to view each source separately.

Hi Weitz Company Llc (The),

We came across your project at 3875 Walnut ST, Denver, CO and thought we'd introduce ourselves. Zement Stone supplies manufactured stone veneer to multi-family developers across Colorado — exact quantities shipped (no overbuying standard pallets), 2,000+ PSI strength built for freeze-thaw cycles, and local production for fast turnaround.

Hi Palace Construction Co Inc,

We noticed your project at 1616 N Pearl ST, Denver, CO and wanted to reach out. Zement Stone specializes in architectural stone veneer for hospitality projects — with 2,000+ PSI compressive strength and true 100 sq.ft coverage (no mortar-joint padding like most manufacturers). We can also match any custom color to your brand standards.

Would you be open to a free sample kit? Happy to connect at your convenience.

Zement Stone specializes in architectural stone veneer for hospitality projects — with 2,000+ PSI compressive strength and true 100 sq.ft coverage (no mortar-joint padding like most manufacturers). We can also match any custom color to your brand standards.

Would you be open to a free sample kit? Happy to connect at your convenience.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com

📧 Outreach email draft
Hi M A Mortenson Company,

We noticed your project at 18191 E 56th AVE, Denver, CO and wanted to reach out. Zement Stone specializes in architectural stone veneer for hospitality projects — with 2,000+ PSI compressive strength and true 100 sq.ft coverage (no mortar-joint padding like most manufacturers). We can also match any custom color to your brand standards.

Would you be open to a free sample kit? Happy to connect at your convenience.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com

We saw your project at nan nan nan nan, Fort Collins, CO and wanted to introduce Zement Stone. We're a local Colorado manufacturer of architectural stone veneer — 2,000+ PSI strength, 100% honest square footage coverage, custom colors, and fast lead times since we produce right here in Littleton.

Happy to send a free sample kit or meet at our showroom.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com

📧 Outreach email draft
Hi nan,

We came across your project at nan nan nan nan, Fort Collins, CO and thought we'd introduce ourselves. Zement Stone supplies manufactured stone veneer to multi-family developers across Colorado — exact quantities shipped (no overbuying standard pallets), 2,000+ PSI strength built for freeze-thaw cycles, and local production for fast turnaround.

We'd love to send you a free sample kit and discuss pricing for your project.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com

Hi nan,

We came across your project at nan nan nan nan, Fort Collins, CO and thought we'd introduce ourselves. Zement Stone supplies manufactured stone veneer to multi-family developers across Colorado — exact quantities shipped (no overbuying standard pallets), 2,000+ PSI strength built for freeze-thaw cycles, and local production for fast turnaround.

We'd love to send you a free sample kit and discuss pricing for your project.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com

📧 Outreach email draft
Hi nan,

We came across your project at nan nan nan nan, Fort Collins, CO and thought we'd introduce ourselves. Zement Stone supplies manufactured stone veneer to multi-family developers across Colorado — exact quantities shipped (no overbuying standard pallets), 2,000+ PSI strength built for freeze-thaw cycles, and local production for fast turnaround.

We'd love to send you a free sample kit and discuss pricing for your project.

Best,
Zement Stone | Littleton, CO | 303-993-2737 | zementstone.com
